claims.summary: The embedding projection basis is deterministic and restart-stable.
claims.disposition: Verified fixed-seed basis identity, checksum, epoch, and repeated health equality.

claims.summary: A near-zero raw projection column could amplify floating-point instability during normalization.
claims.disposition: Verified all norms are finite, no dead dimension exists, and the minimum raw norm has a margin ratio above 10,000 relative to the near-zero threshold.

claims.summary: Every normalized projection column should remain approximately unit length.
claims.disposition: Verified ProjectionBasisHealthV1 and focused normalization tests pin normalized_columns_near_unit without rotating the compatibility basis.

claims.summary: The entropy-gated vibrancy application should remain smooth at and above the gate.
claims.disposition: Verified exact live-math parity, no-discontinuous-pop, requested entropy-point, and clamp-headroom tests.
